conditions.content: 给定的微分方程是 \((x^2D^2 + xD + 1)y = \sin(2\log x)\sin(\log x)\)
D 是微分算子，表示对 y 关于 x 的一阶导数
辅助方程的形式通常为 \((P(x)D^2 + Q(x)D + R(x)y) = 0\)

intermediate_steps.content: \sin(2\log x)\sin(\log x) 展开为 \frac{2\sin(\log x)\cos(\log x)\sin(\log x)}{\cos(2\log x)} = \frac{2\sin^2(\log x)}{\cos(2\log x)}
intermediate_steps.reasoning_logic: 使用三角恒等式展开 \sin(2\log x)\sin(\log x)

intermediate_steps.content: 将展开结果代入原方程，得到改写后的方程 \((x^2D^2 + xD + 1)y = \frac{2\sin^2(\log x)}{\cos(2\log x)}\)
intermediate_steps.reasoning_logic: 代入展开后的表达式到微分方程

final_conclusion.content: 最终答案：\((x^2D^2 + xD + 1)y = \frac{2\sin^2(\log x)}{\cos(2\log x)}\)
final_conclusion.reasoning_logic: 综合推理得出辅助方程
